title: Xray Test Count Extractor
description: Extracts test counts from Xray Cloud using dynamic parameters per row.

#xray_client_id.title: Xray Client ID:
#xray_client_id.description: Your Xray Cloud Client ID for API authentication. Obtain this from Xray Cloud security settings.

#xray_client_secret.title: Xray Client Secret:
#xray_client_secret.description: Your Xray Cloud Client Secret for API authentication. Obtain this from Xray Cloud security settings.

total_tests_source_column_input.title: Total Tests Source Column Name:
total_tests_source_column_input.description: Column containing query for total test count (or will be calculated from manual + automated if manual input exists) as JSON array with parameters: ["project_id", "folder_path", "jql_query"]. Empty strings for optional parameters.

total_tests_number_column_output.title: Total Tests Number Output Column Name:
total_tests_number_column_output.description: Column where test counts will be stored. Contains numeric values or error messages.

automated_tests_source_column_input.title: Automated Tests Source Column Name:
automated_tests_source_column_input.description: Column containing query for automated tests count as JSON array with parameters: ["project_id", "folder_path", "jql_query"]. Empty strings for optional parameters.

automated_tests_number_column_output.title: Automated Tests Number Output Column Name:
automated_tests_number_column_output.description: Name of the column where test counts will be stored. Contains numeric values or error messages.

incremental.title: Incremental Load Enabled:
incremental.description: If true, output data will be loaded incrementally. Set to false for full table replace.

debug.title: Enable Debug Logging:
debug.description: If true, enables verbose debug logging in the job output.
